Comment.value: Called from a button with two parameters - exportMode and level. Can be triggered by Developers, Authors and Editors
Is also called from the Export All Remote CL script
Export content in FAT to the preview server
If level = 0 - no Package selected (Text and Media review layouts) -> STOP

Calculation.Text: "You are trying to export content in this title without selecting a package. Please select content belonging to a specific package before exporting."

Comment.value: When called from Title Settings Portal or from Media or Text view - the package - caller = "Title".
If caller = Title we need to arrange the packages.
Media subtitles or media - package = current media package
Text layout - package = current text package

Calculation.Text: "Please select a package in the dropdown menu below before export."

Comment.value: Translators shall only export language specific text files

Calculation.Text: isTranslator Or ($$localisation_code ≠ FAT Title::Original localisation code)

Comment.value: typeOfTask /* sync - syncing new content from FAT to Preview server publish - building a new package with both content from FAT and code from GitLab */

exportMode /* JSON = All JSON files TEXT = JSON + all TEXT files Media update = JSON + TEXT + updated media - This option is for Authors and Editors Media all = JSON + TEXT + all media Translation = TEXT and Subtitles for localised language (only remote export) Translation files = TEXT and Subtitles for localised language (only local export) */

Calculation.Text: Case ( IsEmpty ( FAT Title::Base project ); "" ; FAT Package::PrimaryKey)
Case ( IsEmpty ( FAT Title::Base project ); "" ; FAT Package::Package type id)

Comment.value: Development export - uncomment for fault trace

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "exportDestination" ; $exportDestination ) & SetProperty ( "remoteType" ; $remoteType ) & SetProperty ( "s3bucketName" ; $s3bucketName ) & SetProperty ( "awsCdnKey" ; $awsCdnKey ) & SetProperty ( "awsEnvironment" ; $awsEnvironment ) & SetProperty ( "apiEndpoint" ; $apiEndpoint ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_type" ; $package_type ) & SetProperty ( "titleLocalisationCode" ; $titleLocalisationCode ) & SetProperty ( "package_dir" ; $package_dir ) & SetProperty ( "resultTransferTarget" ; $resultTransferTarget ) & SetProperty ( "exportMode" ; $exportMode ) & SetProperty ( "typeOfTask" ; $typeOfTask )

Comment.value: Developer publish or publish from Title root - don't wait for completion

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "exportDestination" ; $exportDestination ) & SetProperty ( "remoteType" ; $remoteType ) & SetProperty ( "s3bucketName" ; $s3bucketName ) & SetProperty ( "awsCdnKey" ; $awsCdnKey ) & SetProperty ( "awsEnvironment" ; $awsEnvironment ) & SetProperty ( "apiEndpoint" ; $apiEndpoint ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_type" ; $package_type ) & SetProperty ( "titleLocalisationCode" ; $titleLocalisationCode ) & SetProperty ( "package_dir" ; $package_dir ) & SetProperty ( "resultTransferTarget" ; $resultTransferTarget ) & SetProperty ( "exportMode" ; $exportMode ) & SetProperty ( "typeOfTask" ; $typeOfTask )

SetProperty ( "exportDestination" ; $exportDestination ) & SetProperty ( "remoteType" ; $remoteType ) & SetProperty ( "s3bucketName" ; $s3bucketName ) & SetProperty ( "awsCdnKey" ; $awsCdnKey ) & SetProperty ( "awsEnvironment" ; $awsEnvironment ) & SetProperty ( "apiEndpoint" ; $apiEndpoint ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_type" ; $package_type ) & SetProperty ( "titleLocalisationCode" ; $titleLocalisationCode ) & SetProperty ( "package_dir" ; $package_dir ) & SetProperty ( "resultTransferTarget" ; $resultTransferTarget ) & SetProperty ( "exportMode" ; $exportMode ) & SetProperty ( "typeOfTask" ; $typeOfTask )

Comment.value: Author and editor export from a Package, Chapter or Page - Save, Sync and open in browser!

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "exportDestination" ; $exportDestination ) & SetProperty ( "remoteType" ; $remoteType ) & SetProperty ( "s3bucketName" ; $s3bucketName ) & SetProperty ( "awsEnvironment" ; $awsEnvironment ) & SetProperty ( "awsCdnKey" ; $awsCdnKey ) & SetProperty ( "apiEndpoint" ; $apiEndpoint ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_type" ; $package_type ) & SetProperty ( "titleLocalisationCode" ; $titleLocalisationCode ) & SetProperty ( "package_dir" ; $package_dir ) & SetProperty ( "resultTransferTarget" ; $resultTransferTarget ) & SetProperty ( "exportMode" ; $exportMode ) & SetProperty ( "typeOfTask" ; $typeOfTask )
Not $hideDialog And Not isTitleInformation ( $package_type ) // Title information shall not be previewed
Not isPSOS And FAT Title::Title Backend = "Funkis Cloud"

Comment.value: Exporting new Title information in the background
Find package_id for title_information while using SQL and not change record in layout

Calculation.Text: ExecuteSQL ( "SELECT \"PrimaryKey\" FROM \"FAT Package\" WHERE \"Parent id\" = ? AND \"Package type id\" = ?" ; "" ; "" ; $title_id ; $package_type )

SetProperty ( "exportDestination" ; $exportDestination ) & SetProperty ( "remoteType" ; $remoteType ) & SetProperty ( "s3bucketName" ; $s3bucketName ) & SetProperty ( "awsEnvironment" ; $awsEnvironment ) & SetProperty ( "awsCdnKey" ; $awsCdnKey ) & SetProperty ( "apiEndpoint" ; $apiEndpoint ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_type" ; $package_type ) & SetProperty ( "titleLocalisationCode" ; $titleLocalisationCode ) & SetProperty ( "package_dir" ; $package_dir ) & SetProperty ( "resultTransferTarget" ; $resultTransferTarget ) & SetProperty ( "exportMode" ; $exportMode ) & SetProperty ( "typeOfTask" ; $typeOfTask )

SetProperty ( "exportDestination" ; $exportDestination ) & SetProperty ( "remoteType" ; $remoteType ) & SetProperty ( "s3bucketName" ; $s3bucketName ) & SetProperty ( "awsEnvironment" ; $awsEnvironment ) & SetProperty ( "awsCdnKey" ; $awsCdnKey ) & SetProperty ( "apiEndpoint" ; $apiEndpoint ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_type" ; $package_type ) & SetProperty ( "titleLocalisationCode" ; $titleLocalisationCode ) & SetProperty ( "package_dir" ; $package_dir ) & SetProperty ( "resultTransferTarget" ; $resultTransferTarget ) & SetProperty ( "exportMode" ; $exportMode ) & SetProperty ( "typeOfTask" ; $typeOfTask )
"Something went wrong during the title information export."
